---
title: "MSP input Denmark"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

NA

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea/?folders=144094709,ERqXHN3RQhSK2ZnQsbd-Ew,143436652,143460283,143750761,143750791,144094749,144094754,146388423,146388827,146392362,146589866,146619641,146742883,146743026,146750025,146750132,146819156,147092870,147092932,147114383,147114474,U-X3XasbStSZZ2o1bNCUpQ,OSeOS3wTTTuixcK0yKRl0g,LaL1TbV4SFGhn15RgGj6qQ&layers=I-jFOhIGT9OEI4oTi8c47Q&layerNames=MSP%20Havplan"></iframe>
```

:::
